data.title: RED: Write failing tests for UNLINK event handler in process_outbound
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write failing unit tests for the UNLINK event handler in process_outbound(). Tests cover: read-before-delete with both-endpoint matching, 404 as "already gone", graceful degradation, relates_to-only filtering, and missing SYNC files.

## Test Approach

Test 1 — Happy path UNLINK (read-before-delete):
Given: An UNLINK event with event_type="UNLINK", ticket_id=<source>, data={target_id: <target>, relation: "relates_to"}, both have SYNC files. Mock get_issue_links(source_jira_key) returns [{"id": "12345", "type": {"name": "Relates"}, "outwardIssue": {"key": target_jira_key}}]
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: delete_issue_link("12345") is called (matching link found by both endpoints + type)

Test 2 — Both-endpoint matching:
Given: UNLINK event. get_issue_links returns a "Relates" link to a DIFFERENT target (not the one being unlinked)
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: delete_issue_link() is NOT called (no matching link for both endpoints)

Test 3 — 404 on source issue as "already gone":
Given: UNLINK event where get_issue_links raises CalledProcessError with 404
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: No error raised, processing continues, no bridge_alert written (already gone is expected)

Test 4 — Jira rejection on delete (graceful degradation):
Given: UNLINK event where delete_issue_link raises CalledProcessError (non-404)
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: bridge_alert written, sync continues without blocking

Test 5 — Concurrent modification (409 or 404 on delete):
Given: UNLINK event where get_issue_links finds match but delete_issue_link raises 404 (deleted between read and delete)
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: Treated as "already gone", no error, processing continues

Test 6 — relates_to-only filtering:
Given: UNLINK event with data.relation="blocks"
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: No Jira operations performed (skip non-relates_to)

Test 7 — Missing source SYNC:
Given: UNLINK event where source ticket has no SYNC file
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: Event skipped, no crash

Test 8 — Missing target SYNC:
Given: UNLINK event where target ticket has no SYNC file
When: process_outbound() is called
Then: bridge_alert written, event skipped

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py (Edit: add UNLINK test class/functions)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions for UNLINK handling
  Verify: grep -c "def test.*unlink" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED — handler does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "unlink" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
